observed_failure.surface: OpenSpec full verification consuming a SkillGuard-projected portable parent receipt
observed_failure.prior_local_claim: a passed SkillGuard OpenSpec projection produces the exact current portable-receipt.v1 wire accepted by OpenSpec
observed_failure.observed_result: SkillGuard wrote coverage_ids into the envelope but omitted the same required field from the portable ref, so OpenSpec rejected the ref before executing any owner

classification.error_signature: Portable receipt ref contains unknown or missing fields.

root_cause_backpropagation.supported_cause: the projector test checked the pointer schema and envelope coverage but never asserted the pointer coverage field or its exact key set
root_cause_backpropagation.would_have_failed_if: the model and regression had replayed the generated pointer through the installed OpenSpec consumer or asserted the consumer's exact ref key set
root_cause_backpropagation.new_model_item: a portable projection is not current until the exact consumer ref schema, coverage set, envelope schema, semantic identity, and source freshness all replay end to end
root_cause_backpropagation.owner_code_contract: project_current_test_mesh_aggregation_to_openspec_receipt -> portable ref -> openspec verify external-receipt consumer

generalized_repair.rule: Project the sorted exact coverage_ids into both the portable ref and envelope and pin the ref to the consumer's complete current key set.
generalized_repair.observed_regression: the final installed SkillGuard projected the current PhysicsGuard parent aggregation and real OpenSpec full verification accepted the exact ref and envelope without executing an owner
generalized_repair.same_class_regression: the projection unit test asserts exact pointer keys and the exact coverage list
generalized_repair.negative_boundary: no compatibility reader, optional field, fallback ref, or alternate OpenSpec success path is introduced

required_revalidation: transactional SkillGuard reinstall and installed self-host
real PhysicsGuard portable projection and OpenSpec full verification with execution_count zero

revalidation_evidence.installed_skillguard_projection: PhysicsGuard aggregation sha256:7313fe74b57fdc99540d892df751490113504e4111a9c98da1d61d2db80dbf68 projected as portable receipt sha256:c74834e05bea18e7296ad5580fafde98183c5de013a42ad2ea23780e3f3eb602
revalidation_evidence.openspec_full_verification: passed with one aggregated external receipt, execution_count 0, and OpenSpec projection receipt sha256:10e1344c9a0df3209fc0d9148ef3bcd6ad51b64b056da8c02080049d023e5629
revalidation_evidence.archive: PhysicsGuard change archived as 2026-07-15-migrate-physicsguard-skill-suite-to-skillguard-v2 with 11 specification requirements added

claim_boundary: The repair is validated for the current installed SkillGuard, PhysicsGuard parent aggregation, and real OpenSpec full receipt-only verification. It does not prove unrelated providers, future schema changes, publication, or future AI behavior.
